message:
fix(writing): responsive typography with CSS clamp for mobile

Replace fixed font sizes with responsive clamp() functions across
all article scopes to prevent text overflow on mobile viewports.

Typography fixes:
- .hd-drop-cap::first-letter: 5rem -> clamp(3rem, 10vw, 5rem)
- .hd-callout: 1.75rem -> clamp(1.25rem, 4vw, 1.75rem)
- .barra-callout: 1.75rem -> clamp(1.25rem, 4vw, 1.75rem)
- .cmaes .rq-drop-cap::first-letter: 6rem -> clamp(3.5rem, 12vw, 6rem)
- .hd-display-title: 7.5rem -> clamp(3.5rem, 12vw, 8rem)
- .hd-section-title: 3.5rem -> clamp(2.25rem, 6vw, 4rem)

Additional CSS improvements:
- Add .scrollbar-thin utility for subtle custom scrollbars
- Introduce glass-panel effects (.hd-glass-panel) with backdrop blur
- Add glow utilities (.hd-glow-cyan, .hd-glow-purple, .hd-glow-amber)
- Add .hd-instrument-label for HUD-style monospace labels
- Consolidate Hoeffding article styles under unified scope
- Fix unclosed CSS block for .rq-display-title
- Improve callout gradient and border-radius consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
